---
title: "CorvusProcess.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/core/CorvusProcess.ts"
loc: 173
complexity: 11
logic_score: 2.17
style_score: 4.07
intel_score: 5.24
overall_score: 4.05
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 29 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [spawn](file://child_process)
- [ChildProcessWithoutNullStreams](file://child_process)
- [*](file://readline)
- [EventEmitter](file://events)

### Exports
- `EventEmitter`
- `CorvusProcess`
- `backoff`
- `stdoutStream`
- `stderrStream`
- `line`
- `payload`
- `data`
- `ndjson`
- `success`
- `timeout`
